allow: Bash(python -c "import json; f=open\(''d:/ClaudeCode/Physics/data/formulas.json'',''r'',encoding=''utf-8''\); data=json.load\(f\); f.close\(\); total=0; [print\(f''{t[""name""]}: {len\(t[""formulas""]\)} формул''\) or total.__add__\(len\(t[''formulas'']\)\) for t in data[''topics'']]; print\(''ИТОГО:'', sum\(len\(t[''formulas'']\) for t in data[''topics'']\)\); print\(''Разделов:'', len\(data[''topics'']\)\); print\(''Константы:'', len\(data.get\(''constants'', {}\)\)\)")
